message:
feat(education): enhance glossary with interactive tooltips and contextual help

Significantly improves the educational experience with interactive term
tooltips, keyboard-navigable glossary panels, and a new contextual help
component for view-specific guidance.

GlossaryTermLink Component (TermTooltip.tsx):
- Add portal-based tooltip rendering for proper z-index layering above
  all UI elements
- Implement dynamic placement (top/bottom) based on viewport boundaries
  with 10px spacing and edge clamping
- Support both hover and focus interactions for accessibility
- Click handler enables beginner mode if not active, then opens glossary
  to the specific term
- Use dotted underline and cyan accent color for visual term indication
- Track scroll/resize events to reposition tooltips dynamically
- Add ARIA attributes: haspopup="dialog", expanded state, descriptive label

GlossaryPanel Enhancements:
- Implement two-column layout: term list (left) + definition detail (right)
- Add alphabetical filtering via letter tabs derived from visible terms
- Add keyboard navigation with Arrow Up/Down to traverse filtered list
- Auto-link related terms within definitions using GlossaryTermLink
- Maintain selection state when filters change (select first visible if
  current selection filtered out)
- Add ref-based focus management for keyboard accessibility
- Render term definitions with auto-linked glossary terms using linkText

useGlossary Hook Extensions:
- Add `linkText(text, renderFn)` function that scans text for glossary
  terms and wraps matches with custom render function
- Use regex-based matching sorted by term length (longest first) to avoid
  partial matches
- Return linked React nodes mixed with plain text fragments
- Export linkText alongside existing getTerm, searchTerms, relatedTerms

ContextHelpPanel Component (NEW):
- Contextual help panel showing key concepts for current view
- Accept topics[] prop for primary terms and relatedIds[] for related
- Auto-derive related terms from first primary if relatedIds not provided
- Collapsible UI with InfoButton toggle
- Render short definitions with auto-linked glossary terms
- Display related terms as ghost chips for quick navigation

Barrel Exports (index.ts):
- Export ContextHelpPanel from education module
- Maintain existing exports for GlossaryPanel, TermTooltip, hooks
